ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the draft was held */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the draft */,
  "draft_location" TEXT /* Location where the draft was held */,
  "draft_attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the draft */,
  "draft_start_date" TEXT /* Date the draft started */,
  "draft_end_date" TEXT /* Date the draft ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the draft the round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the round started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the round ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., C, LW, RW, D, G) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Whether the player shoots left or right */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was a captain in their previous team */,
  "draft_eligibility_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was eligible for the draft */,
  "draft_eligibility_status" TEXT /* Status of draft eligibility (e.g., eligible, ineligible) */,
  "previous_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player played for before the draft */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the player played in before the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_previous_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nhl_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., city, state/province) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., junior, college, professional) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., city, state/province) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pick */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round the pick belongs to */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pick (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player selected */,
  "nhl_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NHL team making the pick */,
  "pick_value" INTEGER /* Value assigned to the pick (e.g., 1000 for a first-round pick) */,
  "traded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pick was traded */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Details of the trade if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_nhl_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("nhl_team_id") REFERENCES nhl_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the report belongs to */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scout making the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the scouting report */,
  "physical_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player's physical attributes */,
  "skill_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player's skills */,
  "mental_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player's mental attributes */,
  "potential" TEXT /* Potential of the player (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "nhl_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NHL team the scout belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of scouting experience */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or qualification of the scout */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., goalie, defenseman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_nhl_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("nhl_team_id") REFERENCES nhl_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, scout, team management) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was made */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_development" (
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the development belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the development was measured */,
  "development_level" TEXT /* Level of development achieved by the player (e.g., rookie, sophomore, veteran) */,
  "coaching_notes" TEXT /* Notes from coaches on player development */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics (e.g., speed, agility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_id")
)
